creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
When building ports that depend on and link to libspice-client-gtk-3.0.so.5, the following warning is printed:

Error: /usr/local/lib/remmina/plugins/remmina-plugin-spice.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libspice-client-gtk-3.0.so.5 which does not have a SONAME.  deskutils/spice-gtk needs to be fixed.
